name: screenlink
description: ScreenLink - Private screen sharing with permanent links

scripts.build: pnpm build:shared && pnpm build:vdo-adapter && pnpm build:desktop
scripts.build:installer: pnpm build && cd apps/desktop && npx electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.clean:dev: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process -Name 'electron' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*screenlink*' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; exit 0"
scripts.desktop:dev: pnpm build:shared && pnpm build:vdo-adapter && pnpm --filter @screenlink/desktop dev
scripts.desktop:dev:alice: pnpm build:shared && pnpm build:vdo-adapter && pnpm --filter @screenlink/desktop dev -- --dev-profile=alice --multi-instance
scripts.desktop:dev:bob: pnpm build:shared && pnpm build:vdo-adapter && pnpm --filter @screenlink/desktop dev -- --dev-profile=bob --multi-instance
